description: Published operator action vocabulary. codex-supervisor remains the implementation executor; operator actions must not bypass executor safety gates, issue-lint, fresh GitHub PR facts, local CI, or operator confirmations. This artifact grants no new executor authority and does not enable multi-repo orchestration.

actions.summary: Let the supervised loop keep running the next safe step.
Restart a stopped or stalled loop after the host is healthy.
Repair the supervisor config or host before retrying.
Adopt the repo-owned local CI contract as the pre-PR gate.
Acknowledge and dismiss the advisory local CI candidate.
Hand the issue to a human for manual review judgment.
Resolve a metadata-only stale review bot state.
Flag a suspected provider outage instead of treating signal as content.
Acknowledge an advisory-only signal as safe to ignore.

additiveChanges: Adding new optional fields or new enum values is additive and backward-compatible.
breakingChanges: Removing or renaming an action, or changing required semantics, is a breaking change.
compatibilityPolicy.stabilityLimit: This artifact does not claim runtime enforcement beyond the existing runtime in src/operator-actions.ts.
